title: thelypodium lasiophyllum var. rigidum
intro: Thelypodium lasiophyllum var. rigidum, also known as rigid prairie clover, is a perennial herb in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Thelypodium lasiophyllum var. rigidum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be carefully considered and may require consultation with a healthcare professional.
